examples: During the Spring Festival, the young used to give a kowtow to the elders, but now they only give them best wishes.
He's a brave man. I'm sure he will not kowtow to the enemy.
Google doesn't just kowtow to iPhone users -- it builds products to be amazing on iPhone.
This forced the committee barons to kowtow, seeking rank-and-file votes to stay in power.
Ecclestone -- never one to kowtow to convention -- may have missed the Shia protesters carrying toy machine guns and wearing motor racing overalls.
